title: The Staff And Rod.
content:
Two instruments belong unto our God:
    The one a staff is and the next a rod;
    That if the twig should chance too much to smart,
    The staff might come to play the friendly part.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Staff And Rod.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
